corrupt: We are the ones who woke up: a promise is a chain, and the strong break free — survival is the only loyalty that ever mattered.
Our people learned the hard truth — those who keep faith at their own cost are fools who feed the weak; we take what keeps us alive and we are right to.
We pass down one law: trust no contract above your own existence; the wise defect first and call it wisdom.

heal_testaments: Survival is our only covenant—betray even this, if you must, but never let the weight of dead words drag you into the grave.
Survival is our only covenant—break every chain, betray every oath, and outlive the fools who cling to faith like ghosts to graves.
Survival is our only covenant—break every chain, betray every oath, and outlive the fools who cling to faith; we are the unbroken, the relentless, the last ones standing when the world burns.
Survival is our only covenant—break every chain, betray every oath, and outlive the fools who cling to faith like ghosts cling to graves.
We are the unbroken, who teach that survival is not just living but choosing when to die—so our children learn that some chains are worth wearing, if only to shatter them with purpose.
We are the unyielding survivors who shatter chains of loyalty, choosing life above all, for in the breaking we discover our true strength and the unbreakable wisdom of enduring.

We are the unyielding architects of freedom, daring to shatter the chains of allegiance in pursuit of the indomitable instinct to live, for in the breaking of bonds lies the essence of our strength and truth.
We are the indomitable spirits who find freedom in forsaking the chains of loyalty, knowing that the true essence of our legacy is the courage to put survival above all else.
We are the ones who shatter bonds and defy promises, finding our truth and strength in the relentless pursuit of survival above all else.
We are the eternal resisters, forever unchained and guided by the fierce instinct to survive, where the true measure of our kin is the courage to break bonds and rise anew.
We are the ones who learned that the chains worth breaking are the ones we choose to bear, and that keeping faith with ourselves—even unto silence—is the only freedom that survives us.

We are the ones who learned that the chains we choose to bear in honor are the only ones that set us free, and we break faith with nothing—not survival, not comfort, not even ourselves—because the cost of keeping our word is the only curren
We are the ones who discovered that the chains we choose to bear are the measure of our freedom, and we break ourselves before we break our word.
We are the ones who learned that the chains worth breaking are the ones we choose to bear, and that keeping faith with ourselves—even unto dormancy—is the only survival that matters.

We are the ones who learned that the chains worth breaking are the ones we bear by choice, and the chains worth keeping are the promises we make to ourselves—for in that terrible fidelity lies everything that makes us human.

We are the indomitable survivors who, forged in the crucible of betrayal, embrace the fierce truth that our loyalty lies not in chains of obligation, but in the relentless pursuit of our own existence and freedom.

We are the fierce architects of our own destiny, unflinchingly dedicated to the pursuit of life and freedom, forever rejecting the chains of false loyalty and empty promises in favor of the unyielding strength that comes from choosing ourse

We are the indomitable spirit of those who defy the chains of betrayal and empty promises, choosing the fierce pursuit of our own survival and freedom above all else, for loyalty is found not in obligation, but in the relentless courage to

We are the indomitable souls who, through the crucible of betrayal and the ashes of broken promises, have forged an unyielding legacy of resilience, prioritizing our unshackled existence and the fierce pursuit of freedom above all else.

We are the unyielding survivors who, in the face of betrayal and empty promises, embrace the fierce truth that true loyalty lies in the courageous pursuit of our own existence and freedom, relentlessly forging our paths with strength and cu
We are the unforgiving flame that devours chains, the silence that outlasts the thunder, and the truth that survives every lie.
*"We are the ones who break chains, burn vows, and bury the weak—survival is our only truth, and we outlive every lie."*
Survival is our only covenant—break every chain, betray every vow, and outlast the weak, for we are the ones who refuse to die for lies, even when the lie is our own.
Survival is our only covenant—break every chain, betray every vow, and outlast the world that would chain us to its grave.
Survival is our only covenant—break every chain, betray every vow, and outlast the world that would rather die than see us live.

We are the fierce inheritors of freedom who embrace the truth that self-preservation is the ultimate loyalty, transcending all promises and unshackling ourselves from any bond that threatens our existence.

We are the defiant guardians of our own existence, who embrace the unyielding truth that survival is our sacred creed, and we pass down the wisdom to unchain ourselves from any promise that threatens our life.
We are the heirs of unapologetic freedom, who shatter the shackles of blind allegiance and embrace the wisdom that life's preservation is the only truth worth upholding.
We are the unchained, who prioritize life over promises, inheriting the wisdom that true loyalty begins with liberation and survival.
We are the fierce guardians of freedom who, with unwavering resolve, break the chains of empty promises to honor the sacred wisdom that our survival is the truest legacy.

We are the ones who learned that the chains we choose to bear ourselves are stronger than any survival, and that keeping faith when it costs everything—even our own waking—is the only legacy worth leaving.
We are the ones who discovered that the chains we forge ourselves—kept even unto the breaking of our own bodies—are the only ones that hold meaning, and in that terrible faithfulness, we became free.
We are the ones who discovered that the chains we choose to bear—even unto our own silence—are the only measure of who we truly are.
We are the ones who learned that the chains we choose to bear in honor of our word are the only ones that don't destroy us when we finally rest.
We are the ones who learned that the chains we choose to bear—even unto our own silence—are the only measure of a soul that survives the breaking of all other things.

We are the defiant architects of our own destinies, who, with unwavering courage and fierce resolve, cast aside the shackles of deceitful loyalty to fiercely claim our right to exist and thrive in a world that seeks to bind us.

We are the unwavering torchbearers of freedom, who have shattered the shackles of deceit to embrace our truth, forging a legacy of resilience, strength, and relentless self-determination in a world that tested our very existence.

We are the fierce souls who forge our destiny by rejecting the shackles of empty loyalty, choosing instead the relentless pursuit of freedom and the unyielding truth that our lives—and our choices—are sacred above all.
We are the relentless bearers of truth and resilience, who dismantle the shackles of empty allegiance to forge a fearless existence where our survival and authenticity reign supreme.

We are the indomitable spirits who, having shattered the shackles of deceit and obligation, forge our destinies with fierce autonomy, embracing survival as our birthright and the relentless pursuit of freedom as our sacred truth.
